raw_consumer_statement: I purchased the stove at Best Buy location in XXXX, MD. Employees loaded on to my truck without any packaging, protective plastic or securing appliance. By the time I arrived home, the glass front was shattered. Multiple attempts at resolution via phone, in-person at another store and written complaint to address 1 ) dispute and 2 ) damages. No reply since mailed XXXX. I purchased and installed a replacement glass front and provided these receipts along with photos with my written complaint. I would like this {$140.00} either credit to my account or refund via check.
